version_description: Corrected to power chords, added fills.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Hit Me With Your Best Shot
Stuck In The Middle With You
I Was Made For Lovin You

content:
[Intro]
(Drums)     G5
[ch]E5[/ch]          [ch]G5[/ch]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]          [ch]G5[/ch]

B|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
G|--2~4------0-2--------------------------------------------------------------|
D|---------------0-2----------------------------------------------------------|
A|-------------------0-2------------------------------------------------------|
E|------------------------3-2-------------------------------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]                  [ch]D5[/ch]        [ch]C5[/ch]                  [ch]A5[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]D5[/ch]
Your love is like a tidal wave, spinning over my head[/tab]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]                  [ch]D5[/ch]      [ch]C5[/ch]              [ch]A5[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]D5[/ch]
Drownin' me in your promises, better left unsaid[/tab]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]           [ch]D5[/ch]             [ch]C5[/ch]          [ch]A5[/ch]             [ch]B5[/ch]
You're the right kind of sinner to release my inner fantasy[/tab]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]      [ch]D5[/ch]         [ch]C5[/ch]             [ch]A5[/ch]                [ch]B5[/ch]
The invincible winner and you know that you were born to be[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]E5[/ch]        [ch]F#5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]           [ch]A5[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker Don't you mess around with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E5[/ch]        [ch]F#5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]           [ch]A5[/ch]         [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker Don't you mess around, no, no, no[/tab]


[Break]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]          [ch]G5[/ch]
E5          (fill)[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]                  [ch]D5[/ch]           [ch]C5[/ch]                  [ch]A5[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]D5[/ch]
Your love has set my soul on fire, burnin' out of control[/tab]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]                  [ch]D5[/ch]          [ch]C5[/ch]                   [ch]A5[/ch]       [ch]B5[/ch]  [ch]D5[/ch]
You taught me the ways of desire, now it's takin' its toll[/tab]
[tab][ch]E5[/ch]         [ch]D5[/ch]             [ch]C5[/ch]          [ch]A5[/ch]               [ch]B5[/ch]
You're the right kind of sinner to release my inner fantasy[/tab]
